news.title: Buffy the Vampire Slayer and Ted Lasso star Anthony Head dies aged 72
news.titleEN: Buffy the Vampire Slayer and Ted Lasso star Anthony Head dies aged 72

news.title: "We are seeing a certain degree of effectiveness from the use of generative AI" - Capcom clarifies its stance on using the controversial tech
